series_metadata.series_title: FUT 43 Ohio Motor Fuel use tax Return
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by taxpayers registered with the State of Ohio to operate various classes of motor vehicles and is for the purpose of reporting: total mileage, gallons of motor fuel used, average miles per gallon, Ohio mileage, gallons of motor fuel used in Ohio, gallons of motor fuel purchased in Ohio, untaxed fuel used in Ohio, overpurchases, penalty and tax due.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: returns not microfilmed will be destroyed 4 years after the last day of the calendar year in which the return was filed. If scanned, retain for 6 months. ; Microform: film will be duplicated and stored at separate facilities. Micro Film has to be kepted until all pending cases have been resolved and appeals exhausted due to Oh Supreme Court cases. ; Electronic: Returns not microfilmed will be deleted 4 years after the last day of the calendar year in which the return was filed., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Delete
